chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 662 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of CMA No.311/2023 08.10.2025 Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, advocate for the applicant Mr. Muhammad Nazeer Abbasi, advocate undertakes to file vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent. Per learned counsel, the impugned judgment is devoid of any independent discussion or deliberation/s and is comprised of merely reproduction and a dissonant conclusion. It is jointly stated that it may be just and proper for the impugned judgment to be set aside and the matter be remanded back to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
